query:
SELECT 
  dcc.payment_external_id,
  dcc.is_close_row,
  dcc.payment_tx_amount,
  pt.external_id,
  pt.amount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') AS source
FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
LEFT JOIN payment_transactions pt ON pt.external_id = dcc.payment_external_id AND pt.section = dcc.section
WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365' AND dcc.is_close_row = 1
LIMIT 5;
command:

FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
LEFT JOIN payment_transactions pt ON pt.external_id = dcc.payment_external_id AND pt.section = dcc.section
WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365' AND dcc.is_close_row = 1
